content.en:
"How is it possible, how can you have such terrifying strength?"

The Holy Ancestor was unbelievable.

He is a top ancestor, and he is not a top ancestor who has just broken through, how powerful he is.

In the Dark Forbidden Domain, the top ancestor is the limit, even the top top ancestor can't hit him hard with one blow.

But Ye Tian did it, only one blow hit him hard, if he shot a few more times, he was afraid that he would be killed directly.

"Have you stepped into the Supreme Ancestor?"

The Holy Ancestor was shocked.

But then he denied it again: "Impossible, you can't reach the Supreme Ancestor, no one in the Dark Forbidden Realm can reach the Supreme Ancestor level!"

"Naturally, I haven't reached the Supreme Ancestor level. Ye Tian stared at the Holy Ancestor: "But to kill a top Ancestor like you, it will take a few moves." "

The Holy Ancestor was afraid, once upon a time he was proud of everything, and he was not afraid of anyone except the destruction of the First Ancestor.

But now, he was afraid of Ye Tian.

It's only been a long time, and Ye Tian has grown from an ant to a point where he needs to look up.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, what do you really want?" asked the Holy Ancestor.

Ye Tian stared at the Holy Ancestor and said, "I said before, I want to find the ancient ancestor behind you, don't deny it, otherwise you will die!"

The Holy Ancestor didn't dare to deny it anymore, and hurriedly asked, "What exactly do you want to do with my master?"

Master?

Ye Tian had already guessed, but now he finally got a positive answer from the mouth of the Holy Ancestor.

Sure enough, that ancient ancestor was the master of the Holy Ancestor.

Ye Tian said: "Don't worry, I just asked your master about something, not to trouble him, after all, I don't know him, there is no hatred between each other, there is no need to deal with him!"

"I need to contact Master, if Master doesn't want to see you, I can't help it, after all, I don't know where Master is!"

"No problem!" Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

The Holy Ancestor began to contact his master, and waited slowly.

Not long after, the Holy Ancestor replied, "Master is willing to see you, but only in your incarnation!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

That's when it happened.

An ancestor incarnation appeared in front of Ye Tian, appearing in the image of a middle-aged man, wearing a simple black robe, and the aura on his body was very powerful.

Through this incarnation, Ye Tian roughly judged the strength of the other party, and indeed reached the peak realm of the top ancestor, although it was much worse than him, it was much stronger than the holy ancestor.

"I've seen the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

The black-robed ancestor was polite.

"I don't know what Your Excellency is called?" Ye Tian said lightly.

The black-robed ancestor said, "Call me Bailuo!"

"Ancestor of Bailuo, I want to ask about some information, I don't know if it's okay?" Ye Tian said politely.

"No problem!" agreed.

Immediately, Ye Tian and this Hundred Spirits Ancestor isolated the prying eyes of other Ancestors and communicated privately.

Ye Tian also knew that if he hadn't threatened the Holy Ancestor, this Hundred Spirits Ancestor would definitely not have appeared.

"Ancestor of the Hundred Souls, I want to know what the Great Tribulation is all about?" Ye Tian asked.

"You know the Great Tribulation, too?"

The Hundred Spirits Ancestor was a little surprised.

"That's good!" Ye Tian nodded, "I learned from the mouth of the Bone Clan in the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, the Bone Clan came in from the other end of the door, they stayed in the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, and they could only enter the Dark Forbidden Land during the Great Tribulation, but now they dare not set foot in the Dark Forbidden Land." And with the information I know, there has been a catastrophe in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and forces like the Bone Clan have invaded the Dark Forbidden Domain, but there is no such information in the Dark Forbidden Domain, so I think you ancient ancestors should know a lot of secrets. "

The Hundred Spirits Ancestor was extremely shocked and said, "I didn't expect the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws to know so much and be able to get the news from the mouth of the Bone Clan, which really surprised me." Some of the news can tell you that there have been Tribulations in the Dark Forbidden Realm, and as far as I know, there have been three Tribulations, and I have only experienced one. "

"In terms of realm years, 120,000 realm years are a realm era, one hundred and eight realm epochs can be counted as a dark calendar year, and after nine dark calendar years, there will be a great tribulation. We are now in the third dark year, and there are still six dark years left before the great calamity will come. "

As soon as the Hundred Spirits Ancestor finished speaking, Ye Tian was suddenly startled and said, "Dark Holy Land!"

"That's right, every time a Dark Sanctuary is born, it means that a dark calendar year has passed, and three dark calendars have passed since the last Great Tribulation. Therefore, the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws did not have to worry too much about the next great tribulation. The Hundred Spirits Ancestor said with a smile.

"Then what's the matter with the door, through the door, you can enter other worlds similar to the Dark Forbidden Domain, and you can't break through to the Supreme Ancestor in the Dark Forbidden Domain, about this, the Hundred Spirits Ancestor should know, right?" Ye Tian asked.

"I really know!" "I really know!" the Hundred Spirits Ancestor nodded, "It seems that you also know the Ten Thousand Laws Ancestor, I am surprised by this, even among our group of Ancestors who have experienced a great tribulation, only a very few people know a little. "

Ye Tian told what he knew: "According to the information I know, it is impossible to break through to the Supreme Ancestor in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and it can only be broken through by entering other heavens and earths. However, if other heavens and earths have not entered the Great Tribulation, once they enter other worlds, they will be erased by that side of the world, and they must be passed when other heavens and earths enter the Great Tribulation, and only then can they hope to impact the Supreme Ancestor realm. I'd like to know if any of the Ancestors of the Dark Forbidden Realm have mastered a gate?"

"No!" the Hundred Spirits Ancestor affirmed, "I can tell you for sure that no Ancestor in the Dark Forbidden Realm has mastered a single gate, after all, we have only gone through three great tribulations, and some heavens and earths have even survived ten great tribulations are a hundred great tribulations, compared to other heaven and earth, the Dark Forbidden Domain is still too immature to compete with other powerful heaven and earth. If we had mastered a portal, we might have the hope of giving birth to a Supreme Ancestor, but from what I know, no Supreme Ancestor has been born. Of course, this is what I know, and some Ancestors have passed through the unstable portal and disappeared from there, maybe those Ancestors have stepped into the Supreme Ancestor, but it is more likely that they have fallen through it. "

"Unstable portal, what is that?" Ye Tian was curious.

The Ancestor of Bailuo did not hide it, this is information that is easy to know, and it is nothing to tell Ye Tian.

So, he said, "A door appears shortly after every Dark Calendar in the Dark Forbidden Realm, and this portal only appears for a short time before it dissipates, not for eternity. We still haven't found a way to keep this door forever. Some Ancestors will not be able to withstand the ravages of time, and if they want to be promoted to the Supreme Ancestor, they will venture into another world, and if the other world happens to be in the midst of a great tribulation, then they can survive by luck. But this probability is too low, I dare not bet!"

"So, you can't enter other heavens and earth to impact the combat power of the Supreme Ancestor?"

Ye Tian frowned.

"Yes, there is no way!" "We are too weak, if a force like the Bone Clan is willing to share the eternal gate we have established now, then we have hope of being promoted to the Supreme Ancestor, but they will definitely not be willing." After all, once we hand over such a method, we will have a way to enter their world, and thus potentially threaten their native world. "

Ye Tian was a little disappointed.

Suddenly, Ye Tian asked again: "Do you know which force is the weakest, far less powerful than the Bone Clan, but has a forbidden land in our Dark Forbidden Domain?"

"What do you want to do?" the Hundred Soul Ancestor was a little curious.

"Just tell me. "

Ye Tian said.

Bai Yu was also afraid that Ye Tian would trouble his apprentice, so he said: " As far as I know, the Bone Clan belongs to the middle level among these forces, and the weakest force is called the Haitian Holy Sect, which is a sect of alien beasts, and has a forbidden place in our Dark Forbidden Land, called the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land, but it is not less dangerous than the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, because this forbidden land is covered by seawater with strong erosion ability, only those alien beasts of the Haitian Holy Sect can survive in it, once our ancestor enters, the strength will be weakened by half, and even unable to fight for a long time, and there are at least thousands of strange beasts stationed in this forbidden land, of which there are six or seven foreign beasts whose strength is comparable to that of the top ancestors。 According to speculation, there are not many alien beasts in this force that are comparable to the realm of the strongest ancestors, at most one or two. "

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian thanked.
